_principle: Drift-corrected against v23 + Master Doc PART 4. Pellet inclusion explicit. Hay-only restricted to Sulcata. 'Manager on duty' replaces named persons.
_universal_rules: Encounter portions come FROM daily allocation, never extra
Multi-animal habitats use golf-ball pieces (~1 inch)
Pellet (Mazuri / Missouri) is a component, not a base
Hay-only is Sulcata only — other tortoises have different diets

diets.name: RING-TAILED LEMUR
diets.pellet_rule: Mazuri Leaf-Eater Primate Chow daily — small ration on top of the bowl
diets.morning_feed: Whole-leaf greens piled (kale, collard, dandelion). Fruit in golf-ball pieces (~1 inch) — many small pieces, enough for every animal in the troop. Mazuri leaf-eater primate chow daily as prescribed.
diets.correct: Greens dominant · fruit in small pieces · primate chow daily
diets.wrong: Citrus · romaine-only bowls · starchy vegetables · pellets used as base
diets.encounter: Bite-sized fruit cubes (½ inch) for hand or tong delivery. Drawn from daily allocation.
diets.three_sec: Are greens dominant? Is the chow there?
diets.drift_fix: Re-stated Mazuri chow inclusion explicitly per Master Doc 'Fruit + browse + primate chow' principle.

diets.name: RED RUFFED LEMUR
diets.pellet_rule: Mazuri Leaf-Eater Primate Chow daily — small ration
diets.morning_feed: Fruit in golf-ball pieces (~1 inch) — many small pieces, enough for every animal in the troop (mango, papaya, melon, berries). Whole-leaf greens secondary. Mazuri primate chow daily.
diets.correct: Fruit dominant · greens secondary · primate chow daily
diets.wrong: Citrus · banana-heavy · starchy vegetables · pellets used as base
diets.encounter: Bite-sized fruit cubes (½ inch). Drawn from daily allocation.
diets.three_sec: Is fruit dominant? Is the chow there?
diets.drift_fix: Mazuri primate chow re-added explicitly.

diets.name: BLACK-AND-WHITE RUFFED LEMUR
diets.pellet_rule: Mazuri Leaf-Eater Primate Chow daily — small ration
diets.morning_feed: Fruit in golf-ball pieces (~1 inch) — enough small pieces for every animal in the troop. Whole-leaf greens secondary. Mazuri primate chow daily.
diets.correct: Fruit dominant · greens secondary · primate chow daily
diets.wrong: Citrus · banana-heavy · starchy vegetables · pellets used as base
diets.encounter: Bite-sized fruit cubes (½ inch). Drawn from daily allocation.
diets.three_sec: Is fruit dominant? Is the chow there?
diets.drift_fix: Mazuri primate chow re-added explicitly.

diets.name: GEOFFROY'S SPIDER MONKEY
diets.pellet_rule: Mazuri Primate Chow daily — small ration
diets.morning_feed: Fruit in golf-ball pieces (~1 inch). Whole-leaf greens secondary. Mazuri primate chow daily.
diets.correct: Fruit + leaves + primate chow daily
diets.wrong: Citrus · sugar-heavy fruit · starchy vegetables · pellets used as base
diets.encounter: Bite-sized fruit cubes (½ inch). Drawn from daily allocation.
diets.three_sec: Is fruit dominant? Is the chow there?
diets.drift_fix: Restored to Gold Standard tier; Mazuri chow specified.

diets.name: TWO-TOED SLOTH
diets.pellet_rule: Mazuri Leaf-Eater Primate Chow daily as the base — non-negotiable
diets.morning_feed: Mazuri leaf-eater primate chow as the base. Whole-leaf greens (kale, collard, mulberry leaves). Browse branches with stems intact — stems ARE enrichment.
diets.correct: Chow base + leafy greens + browse with stems
diets.wrong: Vegetable salad bowls · romaine-only · no chow
diets.encounter: Single leaf for slow hand-feeding. Drawn from daily allocation.
diets.three_sec: Is the chow base there? Are the stems left on?
diets.drift_fix: Sloth was DROPPED from Gold Standard 10 in 04-25-d. Restored. Primate chow base is the v23 directive.

diets.name: SIX-BANDED ARMADILLO
diets.pellet_rule: Missouri Insectivore Pellet (Mazuri Insectivore Diet) — base of bowl 1
diets.morning_feed: Insectivore diet (Mazuri / Missouri pellet) weighed as base in bowl 1. Bowl 2: fruit + veg + protein in ½-inch cubes. Live feeders (mealworms, crickets) per SOP. Cooked egg / lean ground meat per SOP.
diets.correct: 50% insect diet · 25% fruit+veg · 15% lean protein (egg/ground meat) · 10% leafy greens
diets.wrong: Cat or dog food · bread or grain · starch-dominant bowls · skipping the protein component
diets.encounter: Single mealworm or cricket for tong-delivery. Drawn from daily allocation.
diets.three_sec: Is the insect base measured? Is protein in bowl 2?
diets.drift_fix: Restored cooked-egg / ground-meat protein component dropped in 04-25-d; restored 4-component split.

diets.name: SOUTHERN THREE-BANDED ARMADILLO
diets.pellet_rule: Missouri Insectivore Pellet (Mazuri Insectivore Diet) — base of bowl
diets.morning_feed: Mazuri insectivore diet (80–90% of meal) weighed in flat shallow bowl. Live feeders (mealworms, crickets) per SOP. Trace cooked egg per SOP.
diets.correct: 80–90% commercial insectivore diet · live feeders · trace cooked egg
diets.wrong: Fruit · vegetables · cat or dog food · large pieces
diets.encounter: Single mealworm for tong-delivery. Drawn from daily allocation.
diets.three_sec: Is the insectivore pellet dominant? Are live feeders set?
diets.drift_fix: Restored trace cooked egg from v23. Specified Missouri/Mazuri pellet by name.

diets.name: NINE-BANDED ARMADILLO
diets.pellet_rule: Missouri Insectivore Pellet (Mazuri Insectivore Diet) — base
diets.morning_feed: Mazuri insectivore diet in flat bowl. Live feeders (mealworms, crickets) per SOP.
diets.correct: Insect diet dominant · live feeders
diets.wrong: Fruit-heavy bowls · vegetable bowls · pet kibble
diets.encounter: Single mealworm for tong-delivery. Drawn from daily allocation.
diets.three_sec: Is the insectivore pellet dominant?
diets.drift_fix: Re-added to Gold Standard tier (was dropped in 04-25-d).

diets.name: SULCATA TORTOISE
diets.pellet_rule: NO PELLETS — Owner directive: hay only
diets.morning_feed: Grass hay only — whole, not chopped. Fresh water always. No greens, no veg, no fruit.
diets.correct: 100% hay · timothy / grass hay
diets.wrong: Greens · vegetables · fruit · pellets
diets.encounter: Pulled fistful of hay for hand-feeding. Drawn from daily allocation.
diets.three_sec: Do I see ONLY hay?
diets.v23_source: Owner directive (verbatim): 'Tortoises eat HAY ONLY' — applies to Sulcata as the grassland grazer.
diets.drift_fix: Confirmed correct. Clarified scope: HAY-ONLY rule applies to Sulcata specifically, not to all tortoises.

diets.name: RUSSIAN TORTOISE
diets.pellet_rule: NO commercial tortoise pellet (drift trigger). Hay + greens are the diet.
diets.morning_feed: Whole-leaf broadleaf greens dominant (dandelion, collard, kale rotated, mulberry). Grass hay secondary. Browse and weeds (dandelion, plantain). Trace fruit only on rare occasions. Fresh water daily.
diets.correct: 70–80% broadleaf greens · 15% grass hay · 5% browse/weeds
diets.wrong: Hay only (this is NOT a Sulcata) · spinach · iceberg · high-oxalate greens daily · daily fruit
diets.encounter: Single dandelion green or mulberry leaf for hand-feeding. Drawn from daily allocation.
diets.three_sec: Are broadleaf greens dominant? Is hay present?
diets.v23_source: AZA Chelonian TAG · Testudo nutrition standards
diets.drift_fix: Re-added to Gold Standard. Russian tortoise is NOT a Sulcata — broadleaf greens dominant, hay is secondary.

diets.name: LEOPARD TORTOISE
diets.category: GRAZING TORTOISE — Hay + Grasses + Limited Greens
diets.pellet_rule: NO commercial tortoise pellet (Master Doc warns against high-protein pellets for grazers).
diets.morning_feed: Whole hay pile (timothy + grass hay). Fresh grasses cut long. Coarse greens (dandelion, mulberry, collard) whole. Browse branches.
diets.correct: 80% grass hay + fresh grasses · 15% coarse greens · 5% browse · NO FRUIT
diets.wrong: Fruit · commercial tortoise pellets · high-protein greens (kale daily)
diets.encounter: Single coarse green leaf or grass strand for hand-feeding. Drawn from daily allocation.
diets.three_sec: Is grass hay dominant? Any fruit visible? (should be none)
diets.v23_source: AZA Chelonian TAG + Sulcata/Leopard nutrition guidelines
diets.drift_fix: Re-added to Gold Standard. Leopard is a strict grazer; differs from Sulcata in tolerating limited coarse greens.

diets.name: YELLOW-FOOTED TORTOISE
diets.category: RAINFOREST OMNIVORE — Fruit + Greens + Trace Protein
diets.pellet_rule: Mazuri Tortoise Diet (LS) 1–2× per week only — NOT daily, NOT base.
diets.morning_feed: Fruit in 1-inch chunks (papaya, mango, melon, berries). Whole-leaf greens (collard, kale, mulberry). Browse branches. Mazuri tortoise diet 1–2× per week. Trace cooked egg or Mazuri pellet weekly.
diets.correct: 40–50% fruit (tropical) · 30–40% greens + browse · 5% trace protein weekly
diets.wrong: Hay only (this is NOT a Sulcata) · daily commercial pellet · daily high-protein
diets.encounter: Single fruit cube (½ inch) for hand-feeding. Drawn from daily allocation.
diets.three_sec: Is fruit visible? Is humidity OK?
diets.v23_source: AZA Chelonian TAG · Chelonoidis denticulatus standards
diets.drift_fix: Re-added to Gold Standard. Forest tortoise — fruit-tolerant, hay-intolerant as a base.

diets.name: SAILFIN DRAGON
diets.pellet_rule: No daily pellet. Live feeders + greens are the diet.
diets.morning_feed: Whole-leaf greens piled (kale, collard, mulberry leaves), not chopped. Fruit in golf-ball pieces (~1 inch) — enough small pieces for every dragon when habitat holds multiple. Live feeders (crickets) per SOP, not daily.
diets.correct: Leaves dominant · small fruit · occasional protein · live feeders per SOP
diets.wrong: Fruit-heavy bowls · vegetable bowls · cat or dog food
diets.encounter: Single cricket for tong-delivery. Drawn from daily allocation.
diets.three_sec: Are leaves dominant?
diets.drift_fix: Banner corrected: USDA Class C for display + CITES Appendix II / USFWS for import-export. NOT TPWD.

diets.name: ARGENTINE BLACK-AND-WHITE TEGU
diets.pellet_rule: No daily pellet. Protein + greens + small fruit.
diets.morning_feed: Lean ground meat or cooked egg measured per SOP as protein component. Whole-leaf greens. Small fruit pieces (½-inch).
diets.correct: 40–60% protein (egg, ground meat) · greens · small fruit
diets.wrong: No protein · fruit-heavy · banana / mango heavy · cat or dog food as substitute
diets.encounter: Single small protein cube or fruit cube for tong-delivery. Drawn from daily allocation.
diets.three_sec: Is protein visible?
diets.drift_fix: Re-added to Gold Standard. Banner corrected from TPWD to Exempt.

diets.name: MONKEY-TAILED SKINK
diets.pellet_rule: No pellet. Whole leaves only.
diets.morning_feed: Whole-leaf greens piled, not chopped (kale, collard, dandelion, mulberry). Small ¼-inch dice of vegetable secondary. Fruit only as minimal accent.
diets.correct: Leaves dominant · veg secondary · fruit minimal
diets.wrong: Fruit-heavy bowls · vegetable-heavy bowls · ANIMAL PROTEIN (causes gout / kidney damage)
diets.encounter: Single whole leaf for hand-feeding. Drawn from daily allocation.
diets.three_sec: Are leaves dominant? Any insects? (should be none)
diets.drift_fix: Confirmed correct.

diets.name: CHINESE WATER DRAGON
diets.pellet_rule: Live feeders are the base. No daily pellet.
diets.morning_feed: Live feeders (crickets, dubia roaches) per SOP as base. Small leafy greens (kale, mulberry leaves). Fruit cubes (½-inch) occasional.
diets.correct: Insects + greens + occasional fruit
diets.wrong: Fruit-heavy bowls · pet kibble · large dry pellets
diets.encounter: Single cricket for tong-delivery. Drawn from daily allocation.
diets.three_sec: Are live feeders the base?
diets.v23_source: v23 catalog · Insect-leaning omnivore lizard class
diets.drift_fix: Re-added to Gold Standard.

diets.name: VEILED CHAMELEON
diets.pellet_rule: No pellet. Live feeders + greens.
diets.morning_feed: Live feeders (gut-loaded crickets, hornworms) per SOP. Whole-leaf greens (collard, dandelion). Small fruit accent occasional.
diets.correct: Live feeders + leafy greens + occasional fruit
diets.wrong: Mealworms as base (chitin issues) · fruit-heavy · pet kibble
diets.encounter: No guest hand-feed for chameleons (stress). Tong-delivery by trained keeper only.
diets.three_sec: Are live feeders set? Are greens whole-leaf?
diets.drift_fix: Re-added to Gold Standard.

diets.name: KEEL-BILLED TOUCAN
diets.pellet_rule: Low-iron softbill chow (Mazuri Softbill Diet) — base of bowl
diets.morning_feed: Low-iron softbill chow (Mazuri) weighed first. Fruit in ½-inch cubes, low-sugar varieties only (papaya, melon, berries). NO citrus, NO banana, NO mango.
diets.correct: Low-iron softbill chow base · low-sugar fruit only
diets.wrong: High-iron foods · citrus · banana · mango · iron-fortified anything
diets.encounter: Single ½-inch fruit cube for tong-delivery. Drawn from daily allocation.
diets.three_sec: Is the chow low-iron? Any forbidden fruit?
diets.drift_fix: Confirmed correct.

diets.name: TOCO TOUCAN
diets.pellet_rule: Low-iron softbill chow (Mazuri Softbill Diet) — base
diets.morning_feed: Low-iron softbill chow weighed first. Fruit in ½-inch cubes, low-sugar varieties only. NO citrus, NO banana, NO mango.
diets.correct: Low-iron softbill chow · low-sugar fruit
diets.wrong: High-iron foods · citrus · banana · mango
diets.encounter: Single ½-inch fruit cube for tong-delivery. Drawn from daily allocation.
diets.three_sec: Is the chow low-iron?
diets.drift_fix: Re-added to Gold Standard tier.

diets.name: ALPACA
diets.pellet_rule: Camelid herbivore pellet — small daily ration in separate bowl, never replaces hay
diets.morning_feed: Whole hay pile, not chopped (timothy, grass hay). Pellet ration in separate clean bowl. Fresh water always.
diets.correct: 80–90% hay (whole stems) · small pellet ration
diets.wrong: Vegetable bowls · fruit · starch foods · chopped hay
diets.encounter: Pulled fistfuls of hay or whole stems for hand-feeding. Drawn from daily allocation.
diets.three_sec: Do I see whole hay?
diets.drift_fix: Confirmed correct.

diets.name: CAPYBARA
diets.pellet_rule: Mazuri herbivore pellet — daily ration
diets.morning_feed: Whole hay (timothy / grass hay) as base. Mazuri herbivore pellet ration. Whole-leaf greens (kale, romaine OK occasional, collard).
diets.correct: Hay base · daily herbivore pellet · whole-leaf greens
diets.wrong: Fruit-heavy · pet kibble · sugary treats from guests
diets.encounter: Whole-leaf green or hay strand for hand-feeding. Drawn from daily allocation.
diets.three_sec: Hay + pellet + greens visible?
diets.drift_fix: Re-added to Gold Standard. Master Doc lists capybara among hay-eating animals to protect from guest feeding.

diets.name: PATAGONIAN MARA
diets.pellet_rule: Mazuri herbivore pellet — small daily ration
diets.morning_feed: Whole hay (timothy, grass) as base. Small pellet ration. Whole-leaf greens.
diets.correct: Hay base · small pellet ration · greens
diets.wrong: Fruit-heavy · sugary treats · pet kibble
diets.encounter: Whole-leaf green or hay strand for hand-feeding. Drawn from daily allocation.
diets.three_sec: Hay + pellet + greens visible?
diets.drift_fix: Re-added to Gold Standard.

diets.name: RABBIT
diets.pellet_rule: Timothy-based rabbit pellet — small daily ration
diets.morning_feed: Whole timothy hay as base. Small pellet ration. Whole-leaf greens.
diets.correct: Hay base · small pellet · greens
diets.wrong: Carrots daily · sugary fruit · pet kibble
diets.encounter: Whole-leaf green for hand-feeding. Drawn from daily allocation.
diets.three_sec: Hay + pellet + greens visible?
diets.drift_fix: Re-added to Gold Standard.

diets.name: BENNETT'S WALLABY
diets.pellet_rule: Macropod pellet (Mazuri Wallaby/Kangaroo) — daily ration
diets.morning_feed: Whole hay (timothy / grass hay) base. Macropod pellet ration. Whole-leaf greens.
diets.correct: Hay · macropod pellet · greens
diets.wrong: Fruit-heavy · bread · pet kibble · sugary treats from guests
diets.encounter: Whole-leaf green or hay strand for hand-feeding. Drawn from daily allocation.
diets.three_sec: Hay + macropod pellet + greens visible?
diets.v23_source: v23 catalog · Grazer macropod class · Master Doc PART 4 'Hay-Eating Animals' (kangaroo class)
diets.drift_fix: Re-added to Gold Standard.

diets.name: KINKAJOU
diets.pellet_rule: Mazuri Frugivore Diet — small daily ration
diets.morning_feed: Mazuri frugivore diet ration. Soft fruit in golf-ball pieces (~1 inch) — papaya, melon, berries, banana OK. Trace cooked egg or insect protein.
diets.correct: Soft fruit · daily frugivore pellet · trace protein
diets.wrong: Citrus · hard fruit · cat / dog food
diets.encounter: Single fruit cube (½ inch) for tong or hand. Drawn from daily allocation.
diets.three_sec: Is fruit soft and small? Pellet visible?
diets.drift_fix: Re-added to Gold Standard.

diets.name: PREHENSILE-TAILED PORCUPINE
diets.pellet_rule: Mazuri Leaf-Eater Primate Chow — small daily ration
diets.morning_feed: Whole-leaf greens (kale, mulberry, collard). Browse branches with stems. Mazuri leaf-eater chow ration. Sweet potato slice as occasional supplement.
diets.correct: Leaves + browse + small chow ration
diets.wrong: Fruit-heavy · cat or dog food · pellet as base
diets.encounter: Single leaf for hand-feeding. Drawn from daily allocation.
diets.three_sec: Leaves + browse + chow visible?
diets.drift_fix: Re-added to Gold Standard.

drafts.name: GIANT ANTEATER (DRAFT — pending owner sign-off)
drafts.pellet_rule: Anteater slurry: Mazuri Insectivore Diet blended with water + supplements per AZA Edentata TAG
drafts.morning_feed: Anteater slurry per AZA standard (blended Mazuri insectivore + nutritional yeast + supplements + water). Fed in trough or feeding tube. Live feeders (mealworms, crickets) on enrichment days.
drafts.encounter: No guest hand-feed (long tongue / stress risk). Keeper-only with trained handler.
drafts.v23_source: DRAFT — not in v23. AZA Edentata TAG anteater nutrition standards.
drafts.drift_fix: NEW species — DRAFT card pending owner approval. Owner mentioned anteater is on exhibit and walks on leash through park (enrichment doc required separately).

drafts.morning_feed: High-protein commercial felid diet per vet protocol. Raw meat / whole prey enrichment per SOP.
drafts.wrong: Fruit · vegetable · grain-based diet · plant protein
drafts.encounter: No public hand-feed (welfare). Trained keeper only.
